title: Professional Analytical Presentation, Data Visualization, and Business Insight Design Specialist
desc: A highly professional and detail-oriented specialist is required to create modern analytical presentations and visually engaging data visualization materials. The ideal candidate should have strong experience in presentation design, business reporting layouts, visual data organization, charts, graphs, typography, and overall information presentation. The main goal of this project is to transform complex information and business insights into clean, professional, and easy-to-understand visual presentations while maintaining modern corporate design standards. Strong attention to layout structure, visual consistency, color balance, and audience-focused presentation style is essential. Final deliverables should be visually appealing, well-organized, and optimized for both desktop and presentation platforms. A strong understanding of modern presentation trends, corporate branding, and analytical storytelling is highly preferred.

title: Professional PowerPoint & Presentation Designer

Scope - Design presentation templates (PPT/PPTX) - Create presentations from existing content - Polish and refine existing slides for visual consistency - Ongoing work with potential for long-term partnership What You'll Get From Us - Brand guidelines - Base slide content - Reference examples Selection Process 1. Portfolio Review" Show us your best presentation design work 2. Paid Test Projec: Design 5–10 slides to demonstrate your skills Requirements - Expert PowerPoint/design skills - Strong portfolio with high-end presentation work - Experience working with marketing agencies preferred - Available for ongoing projects To Apply Include: - Portfolio link - Current availability & hourly rate - Examples of agency/marketing presentation work When responding say OHHH YEHHH in the Subject L1ne!

title: Reel Video editing

Again, I can provide all the photos but need the person that is able to make this someone that can take into consideration the aesthetics, balancing the image colours, adding my brand logo and really focusing on the audio scape. https://www.instagram.com/reel/DP66C21jUtU/ https://www.instagram.com/reel/DRuHTZljSXy/ When applying for this project, please do not apply with AI generated standard response, if you can provide some form of example of similar detailed editing you've done that will help me make my decision. title: Reels-Centric Social Media Content
desc: I’m launching a consistent content push on Instagram and Facebook and need a creative partner who can deliver a steady flow of short, eye-catching video reels. Your main focus will be turning ideas or raw footage into polished clips that feel native to each platform, then pairing them with concise, engaging captions and smart hashtags. Whenever we insert static visuals, keep them corporate and professional so they blend seamlessly with the video grid. The messaging must speak to a general audience—clear, relatable, and always on brand. Here’s what the workflow looks like: • Produce 3–5 reels per week in Canva or the native Reels editor (1080 × 1920). • Craft captions, tag collaborators, and select hashtags that drive discovery. • Schedule everything in Meta Business Suite at peak times and confirm it’s queued. • Track basic analytics and feedback, suggesting quick optimisations that lift reach and engagement. A reel is marked complete when the final file is delivered, the caption sits in our shared sheet, a scheduling screenshot is uploaded, and a seven-day engagement note is added. If you’ve created high-performing Instagram or Facebook reels before, drop a link or two so I can see your style. Let’s keep the feed moving.

title: Regular Video Editor Needed

The project will involve editing a minimum of 3 videos per week, with the possibility of increasing up to 15 videos per week depending on the workflow and availability. Each video will be approximately 30 minutes long on average. I am looking for someone who can provide professional-quality editing, including clean cuts, smooth transitions, audio improvement, text when needed, and an overall polished final result. Please apply only if you are available for consistent weekly work and can handle a regular volume of videos. When applying, please include: Your experience with video editing Examples of previous work Your price per 30-minute video Your estimated delivery time per video The software you use for editing I am looking for someone serious, reliable, and available for a long-term collaboration. Thank you, and I look forward to hearing from you.

Instrucciones paso a paso para agregar o cambiar contenido. 4. Soporte inicial para dejar todo funcionando en la primera TV. Si ya trabajaste con soluciones tipo Xibo, Screenly, Yodeck u otra plataforma similar, mencionalo. Priorizaré la simplicidad y la e

They will be responsible for planning and executing marketing campaigns, creating compelling visual content, managing social media accounts, analyzing performance metrics, and ensuring consistent brand messaging across all channels. # Key Responsibilities * Develop and implement social media marketing strategies aligned with business goals. * Create engaging content for platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, and YouTube. * Design high-quality graphics, banners, advertisements, infographics, and promotional materials. * Plan and manage content calendars, campaigns, and paid advertising initiatives. * Monitor social media trends and identify opportunities to i

title: Social Media Promo Video Editing
desc: I have a steady stream of raw clips that need to be shaped into punchy, fast-paced promotional videos for Instagram, YouTube and Facebook. Each cut should grab attention within the first few seconds, keep the energy high throughout and close with a clear call-to-action. What I’ll send you • Raw footage, logos and basic messaging points • Any product or offer details that must appear on screen What I need back • Fully edited masters in the correct aspect ratios for each platform (9:16 for IG Reels/Stories, 1:1 or 4:5 for the feed, and 16:9 for YouTube & Facebook) • Dynamic text overlays, motion graphics and light sound design that match the brand palette • Clean color grading and audio leveling so the content feels polished on every device • Exported MP4 files plus the editable project files (Premiere Pro or Final Cut, whichever you prefer) Turnaround & cadence I’m aiming for a workflow where you can turn a batch around within 3-4 days. If this first project goes smoothly, there will be ongoing monthly edits. Send over a quick reel or links to past work that shows you can handle fast edits, snappy pacing and social-ready formatting and we can get started right away.

title: Tech-Focused Social Media Graphics
desc: I’m looking for a creative partner who can give our feeds a unified, unmistakably tech-driven look and feel. The objective is simple: every post should reinforce our brand identity and grow awareness among our audience. The core of the work is designing eye-catching, on-brand visuals for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter and TikTok. Think clean lines, modern type, subtle gradients and the kind of subtle motion or micro-interactions that resonate with a tech-savvy crowd. Each graphic needs to be sized correctly for its platform while retaining a consistent aesthetic across all four channels. To keep collaboration smooth, here’s what I need from you: • Concept and mood board that captures the tech theme before full production • Platform-specific templates (static and, where it adds value, short animations) delivered in editable source files and ready-to-post exports • A concise style guide outlining colors, fonts and usage rules so any future pieces stay on brand • Two rounds of revisions per asset to fine-tune details without slowing momentum If you’re comfortable scheduling the finished posts or advising on optimal posting cadence, that’s a welcome bonus, but the primary deliverable is stellar graphics that elevate our brand presence. Let’s make our social channels look as innovative

title: Trade Show Booth Graphic Design
desc: I'm looking for a graphic designer to create artwork for a trade show booth — backdrop, table cover, and podium wrap. The booth is for an EdTech company exhibiting at a national conference. I have brand assets, fonts, and the vendor's artwork templates ready to share once we connect. Looking for a designer who: - Has trade show or large-format print experience - Can deliver print-ready files (CMYK, to vendor template specs) - Has a clean, minimal aesthetic - Works in Adobe Illustrator We'll align on direction and copy on a kickoff call. Budget: $300-500 Timeline: final files in a week To apply, please share a few examples of trade show or print design work you've done.

title: Transform Event Footage Seamlessly
desc: I have raw footage from a recent event and want it shaped into a smooth, engaging final video that captures the energy of the day. The work centres on three key actions: trimming or cutting any unusable moments, weaving in tasteful transitions and visual effects to keep the pace lively, and layering clear text or title cards wherever they help the story (speaker names, agenda points, lower-thirds, closing credits, etc.). I’ll supply all source files via cloud link along with a simple running order. From there, you handle the edit in the platform you know best—Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or another professional NLE—so long as the exported file arrives ready to share online and play flawlessly at full HD or higher. Deliverables • One polished event video (H.264 MP4, 1080p or better) • A version with and without embedded titles if that simplifies revisions • Project file or edit package so future tweaks are possible Please let me know your estimated turnaround time and share a sample of similar event edits you’ve completed. Looking forward to seeing how you can bring this occasion to life on screen.

title: Two AI-Generated Marketing Videos
desc: I need two short AI-driven videos that mirror the energy, pacing, and overall look of a reference clip I will share as soon as we start. The primary goal is marketing, so each video has to capture attention quickly and leave viewers remembering the brand. Here is what I already know: • Purpose: pure marketing—think scroll-stopping, share-worthy content that fits seamlessly into social feeds or an ad slot. • Reference: supplied link will define tone, colour palette, rhythm, and approximate run time. • Style & message: I’m open. Whether you lean on full AI animation (e.g., Runway, Synthesia, Pika) or blend real footage with AI-enhanced visuals, I only care that the final output feels on-brand and professional. We can refine the script together to match either brand-awareness or direct-promotion angles once you see the reference. Deliverables (both videos): 1. Script and storyboard draft for approval 2. Final videos in 1080p (MP4 + source project files) 3. Two rounds of post-delivery tweaks for minor edits If you have a reel showing previous AI-generated marketing work, especially pieces that mimic an existing style, that will help me lock this in quickly. I’m ready to move as soon as I find the right creative partner.

title: Video Editor / Motion Graphics Designer (Backup Editor — Ongoing Potential)

What you'd work on: Our projects need a mix of motion graphics across formats: - Long-form YouTube: animated captions, lower thirds, stat callouts, intro/outro stings - Short-form / Reels: kinetic captions, on-screen hook text, motion-driven overlays - Case study videos: animated stats, UI/website reveals, logo animations - Brand showcase graphics: polished, on-brand motion pieces What we're looking for: - Strong motion graphics chops (After Effects or similar) - STRONG UI taste - Ability to match an existing brand style - Reliable turnaround and clear communication - Bonus: experience with AI tools/workflows that speed up editing To apply: Share a few relevant samples (motion graphics-heavy work preferred) and a quick note on your availability and rate.

What the project involves: Editing a short intro video Motion graphic design (animated text, transitions, visual elements) Strong visual editing and overall pacing A final result that looks crisp and professional What I'm looking for in you: Proven experience in video editing and motion graphics A portfolio or reel showing relevant prior work (please include links; applications without samples won't be considered) Attention to detail and good visual taste Reliable communication and ability to meet deadlines To apply, please include: - Links to 2 or 3 examples of similar work you've done - A brief note on your editing process and the software you use - Your estimated timeline and rate for a project like this I'll share the raw footage and a clear brief with the selected editor. This starts as a single project, but if the work is done well, there's potential for ongoing editing work down the line. Looking forward to seeing your work!

title: iOS App Screenshot Design
desc: My iOS app is almost ready for release and I need a set of polished App Store screenshots presented in a professional, clean style. The series should spotlight our key features, show off the intuitive user interface, and hint at the app’s impressive performance gains so potential users understand the value at a glance. I’ll share a basic colour palette, logo, and copy deck — use them as a starting point, but feel free to propose layout tweaks or subtle creative touches that strengthen the visual story while staying within brand tone. Deliverables • 6–8 static screenshots at Apple’s latest iPhone resolution • Resized versions for any additional required devices (iPhone SE, iPad, etc.) • Source files in Figma or Adobe XD plus export-ready PNGs Acceptance criteria • Each slide highlights at least one focus area: feature, UI, or performance metric • Text remains legible on both light and dark backgrounds • Files comply with Apple App Store size and format rules If you have previous App Store work, please include it so I can move quickly.

title: Expert Graphic Designer Wanted for High-End Social Media Banners (YouTube, LinkedIn, Facebook)

Strong understanding of platform dimensions, safe zones, and visual hierarchy. Ability to respect and enhance our brand guidelines. Fast turnaround and seamless communication. If you have an eye for clean, impactful typography and modern layouts, please apply with a link to your portfolio showing similar work. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted immediately.

desc: I need a skilled freelancer to convert a JPG/PNG file into a vector file. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and be proficient in using Adobe Illustrator. title: Convert Logo to Vector Format
desc: I need someone to convert my logo from PNG to a vector format in .ai file. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and vector graphics, ensuring high-quality output. This is a small-scale project with a short duration, perfect for freelancers looking to showcase their skills in logo design and vector conversion.

title: Design a Product Catalog PDF
desc: I urgently need help from a graphic designer who can create a clean and professional product catalog PDF. The catalog will include product images, pricing, descriptions, brand colors, and a modern layout for marketing purposes. Pages: Maximum 13 to 15 I will share all the details and related data once I confirm the right freelancer.

title: Enhance PPT Presentation and Graphics
desc: Already have 15 pages PPT presentation and corporate graphics, I want to upgrade presentation for better look and impact. Seeking a freelancer with experience in presentation design and graphic design to enhance the visual appeal and effectiveness of the materials. The project requires intermediate proficiency and is expected to be completed in less than a month.

title: Expert Photoshop Designer Required
desc: If you're posting a Photoshop Design Service project on Freelancer, you can paste this professional brief: Professional Photoshop Designer Needed Project Description: I am looking for an experienced Photoshop designer to create high-quality and visually appealing graphic designs for my business and social media needs. The designer should have strong creativity, attention to detail, and excellent Photoshop skills. Requirements: Expert-level Adobe Photoshop skills Professional photo editing and retouching Thumbnail design for YouTube videos Social media post and banner design Poster, flyer, and advertisement design Background removal and image manipulation Color correction and enhancement Creative typography and layout design Fast turnaround time Ability to follow branding guidelines Deliverables: High-resolution JPG, PNG, and PSD files Editable source files Modern and professional designs Multiple revisions if required Preferred Skills: Adobe Photoshop Graphic Design Photo Editing Thumbnail Design Social Media Design Branding & Marketing Design Additional Information: Please share your portfolio showcasing previous Photoshop work, especially thumbnails, posters, banners, and social media creatives. Looking for a long-term collaboration with the right designer. Budget: Open to disc
